items.title: Grammar focus
items.body:
Use the structure from the workbook. Pay attention to word order, negatives, and questions.

Examples:
• Do you want to go downtown with me tomorrow?
• 7- Do you study English at night? / in the morning / in the afternoon.
• 9- Do you play the piano? / guitar / violin.
• Dia dos namorados
• for children and adults.

items.prompt: 10- Do you like to drink coffee or juice for breakfast? / coffee – tea / milj – juice
items.answer: 9- Do you play the piano? / guitar / violin.

items.prompt: Valentine’s Day is a special day

items.text: Do you want to go downtown with me tomorrow?
Do you want to go downtown with me tomorrow?
7- Do you study English at night? / in the morning / in the afternoon.
